title: Hot Bee Magic Water Gel Water Elf Kit Squishy Maker Set Aqua Fairy Beads Art Craft Gift for Girls Boy Age 4 5 6 7 8 9 Toy for Kids Make Your Own Squishies Water Pets 10 Color 8 Double Sided Molds
features: 【Magic Water Gel Kit】This magic water gel kit includes 8 double-sided molds (marine animals + land creatures) to create 16 different shapes. With vibrant colors (5 Basic gell + 5 pearl gels), kids ages 5-8 can mix and match for endless creative possibilities. Perfect DIY toy for kids

【Child-Safe Materials】Made from natural seaweed extract and food-grade calcium lactate. Non-toxic, odorless, and rigorously tested for safety. Ideal fidget toy for kids ages 4-8. Great sensory play kit that develops fine motor skills and color recognition
【Great Learning Toy】Watch liquid gels magically solidify in water within minutes! Includes 100g calcium lactate powder to preserve creations longer. Perfect educational toy for 6-9 year olds
【Complete Ocean Adventure Set】Contains plastic storage box, 10 gels, 8 molds, 4x25g calcium powder, stirring stick, net spoon, and instructions - everything for endless creative fun.
【Perfect Gift Choice】Beautifully packaged as birthday or Christmas present. Encourages creativity and parent-child bonding. Excellent arts and crafts gift for girls and boys who love marine life.
description: From the brand Previous page Our brand story began in 2010, when our founders realized there was a lack of innovative toy products in the market. So they decided to design and manufacture toys themselves to fill this gap. After years of research and continuous improvement, Hot Bee has grown into a highly influential toy brand.
